_note: Bounding boxes of MVP glyphs on data/sources/loth-1866/chart.jpg (1633x1869, identical to the cairosvg-rendered chart.svg). Each entry: y0/y1/x0/x1 = main crop in pixels; `exclude` = list of sub-rectangles whited out within the crop (handles glyph slant bleeding into neighbours). v0.2 calibration fields feed mvp.tools.trace_skeleton: `baseline_y` and `midband_y` are pixel y-coordinates of the writing-baseline and the top of the x-height region for that glyph's row (their difference is the normalisation unit, baseline=0 / midband=1). `start_xy` is a pixel-coord seed; the trace tool snaps it to the nearest skeleton ENDPOINT in the start_xy's connected component and walks the stroke from there. Optional `branch_choices` is a list of integer branch indices for resolving each junction encountered along the walk (empty/missing → default 'straightest continuation'). Optional `n_anchors` overrides the default 14 sample points along the resampled polyline.
